name: Auto Torch
author: nabagaca
description: Automatically places torches in dark areas

showMessages.label: Show Messages
showMessages.description: Display chat notifications when using auto-torch.

showDebugMessages.label: Show Debug Messages
showDebugMessages.description: Show debug-only auto-torch messages such as placement failures.

brightnessLevelTrigger.label: Brightness Percentage Trigger
brightnessLevelTrigger.description: The brightness percentage below which torches are placed (0-100)
